transcript: Customer: Hi, this is Tom Bradley. I'm calling because my shower valve keeps running. Dispatcher: Hi Tom, I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what brand it is? Customer: It's a Moen, pretty new, 2 years. Dispatcher: Okay, and what's the service address? Customer: 9 Lakeview Drive. Dispatcher: Got it. We can send a technician out Wednesday afternoon. Does that work? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

expected_entities.equipment: Moen shower valve, pretty new, 2 years
